get.summary: Verify email address (for email links without /auth prefix)

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Question type filter. Accepts canonical values and aliases: objective->mcq, theory->essay, practical->calculation.

get.summary: List past questions for a course
Preview extracted questions, signed URLs for source PDF and stored JSON (if any)
List upload queue items (alias of GET /ta/upload-queue)
Get signed URL for original source document linked to this question

get.description: Requires JWT. Enforces past-question access: paid/unlimited users always allowed; free users get 3 unique questions via server-side ledger, then must use credits. This route calls `openPastQuestion` atomically before returning the question — expect 403 when access is denied (body message = reason).

403.description: Past question access denied (limit reached or no credits)

get.summary: Get a past question by id

post.summary: Upload question file → R2; enqueue Bull job for extract + parse (202)

requestBody.description: PDF + JSON bundle: both are stored in R2 (`.../source.pdf`, `.../extracted.json`), then questions are created from JSON with `attachmentKey` = PDF.

extracted.description: JSON file: array of questions or { "questions": [...] }

post.summary: Store PDF + extracted JSON in R2, then apply JSON as past questions (202)
Upload slide to R2 and enqueue processing

get.description: Get the authenticated user's profile information. Password field is excluded from response.

patch.description: Update the authenticated user's profile information. User will be re-indexed in search if FEATURE_SEARCH_ENABLED=true and FEATURE_JOBS_ENABLED=true.
Upload a profile photo. **Requires FEATURE_OBJECT_STORAGE_ENABLED=true**. When disabled, this endpoint will return an error. Only image files are accepted.

400.description: No file provided or file is not an image

get.description: Get a paginated list of tasks for the authenticated user. Supports filtering by status and search query. Search uses Meilisearch if FEATURE_SEARCH_ENABLED=true, otherwise falls back to database search.

post.description: Create a new task. The task will be indexed in search if FEATURE_SEARCH_ENABLED=true and FEATURE_JOBS_ENABLED=true.

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific task. Users can only access their own tasks.

404.description: Task not found or access denied

patch.description: Update task details. Status transitions must follow: OPEN -> IN_PROGRESS -> DONE. Task will be re-indexed if FEATURE_SEARCH_ENABLED=true and FEATURE_JOBS_ENABLED=true.

400.description: Invalid input data or invalid status transition

404.description: Task not found or access denied

delete.description: Delete a task. Task will be removed from search index if FEATURE_SEARCH_ENABLED=true and FEATURE_JOBS_ENABLED=true.

404.description: Task not found or access denied

post.description: Register a new user account. Password must be at least 8 characters. Initializes free question credits on the backend; optional `referralCode` (e.g. EDU-XXXXX) attributes signup to a referrer. User will be indexed in search if FEATURE_SEARCH_ENABLED=true and FEATURE_JOBS_ENABLED=true.

409.description: User with this email already exists

post.description: Authenticate user and receive access and refresh tokens. Access tokens expire in 15 minutes, refresh tokens in 7 days.
Obtain a new access token using a valid refresh token. Refresh tokens are valid for 7 days by default.
Verify email address using verification token. Requires FEATURE_MAIL_ENABLED=true and FEATURE_EMAIL_VERIFICATION_ENABLED=true

get.description: Verify email address via GET request (typically used in email links). Requires FEATURE_MAIL_ENABLED=true and FEATURE_EMAIL_VERIFICATION_ENABLED=true
get.summary: Verify email address (GET - for email links)

post.description: Resend email verification link. Requires FEATURE_MAIL_ENABLED=true and FEATURE_EMAIL_VERIFICATION_ENABLED=true

400.description: Email already verified or invalid email

post.description: Request a password reset email. Requires FEATURE_MAIL_ENABLED=true

200.description: If the email exists, a password reset link has been sent

example.message: If the email exists, a password reset link has been sent

post.description: Reset password using reset token from email. Requires FEATURE_MAIL_ENABLED=true

get.description: Returns the user from Convex by JWT `sub`. If you get 401 after deploys or migrations, sign in again so `sub` matches a Convex user id.

503.description: The Health Check is not successful

post.description: Upload a file to object storage. **Requires FEATURE_OBJECT_STORAGE_ENABLED=true**. When disabled, this endpoint will return an error.

400.description: No file provided or invalid file

get.description: Generate a time-limited signed URL for accessing a private file. **Requires FEATURE_OBJECT_STORAGE_ENABLED=true**.

403.description: Access denied - user does not own this file

get.summary: Get signed URL for private file

delete.description: Delete a file from object storage. **Requires FEATURE_OBJECT_STORAGE_ENABLED=true**.

403.description: Access denied - user does not own this file

get.description: Returns no tasks. Task search depended on PostgreSQL/TypeORM, which Convex MVP replaced.
get.summary: Search tasks (removed — tasks module retired for EDULAMAD MVP)

get.description: Search users by query string. **Requires FEATURE_SEARCH_ENABLED=true**.
Task search is disabled without the legacy tasks datastore.
get.summary: Global search (users only for EDULAMAD MVP)

get.description: Returns Convex referral stats plus `referralLink` built from server `FRONTEND_URL` / auth.frontendUrl (e.g. `https://app.example/signup?ref=EDU-XXXXX`).

200.description: Referral snapshot for the current user

get.summary: Referral code, stats, and shareable signup link

get.description: Past-question access ledger: `balance` is net from ledger (respecting credit expiry where applicable), `viewedQuestionIds` counts toward the free-tier unique-question cap server-side on `GET /questions/:id`.

200.description: Credit summary and ledger rows from Convex

get.summary: Question credit balance, lifetime stats, views, ledger

post.summary: Create or update student profile with study category

get.summary: Get current streak summary from student profile
Get XP summary from student profile

post.summary: Chat completion (OpenAI + Convex session + usage log)
Paystack webhook (requires raw body + x-paystack-signature in production)

patch.description: When `status` becomes `approved` for the first time, the uploader receives +2 question credits (`contribution`) in Convex.

get.summary: In-app notifications for the current user (Convex users id)
Learning analytics snapshots for the current user
List exam timetable entries for current user

post.summary: Create an in-app / push / email notification for a user

post.description: Set `unlocksPlan` and/or `questionCredits` (>=1). At least one is required. Optional `creditExpiresAt` (Unix ms) applies to granted credits.

patch.description: Partial update; may include `questionCredits` and `creditExpiresAt` for credit-granting codes.

delete.summary: Delete all solutions for a past question (admin tooling / re-seed keys)

post.description: Codes may grant `unlocksPlan` (basic/pro), `questionCredits`, or both. Subscription is upserted only when the code unlocks a plan. Question credits are applied in Convex and subscription/credit caches are invalidated.

200.description: Redemption succeeded. `unlocksPlan` present only for plan codes; `questionCreditsGranted` only when the code grants credits; either or both may be set.

400.description: Invalid code, already redeemed, expired, or misconfigured

post.summary: Redeem a promo code (plan unlock and/or question credits; busts subscription + credit cache)

get.summary: List your promo redemptions (active codes only)

info.title: NestJS Production API
info.description:
Production-ready NestJS backend boilerplate API documentation.
    
**Feature Status:**
- All features enabled

**Feature Toggles:**
All features are controlled via environment variables:
- FEATURE_REDIS_ENABLED
- FEATURE_JOBS_ENABLED
- FEATURE_MAIL_ENABLED
- FEATURE_EMAIL_VERIFICATION_ENABLED
- FEATURE_OBJECT_STORAGE_ENABLED
- FEATURE_SEARCH_ENABLED

Set these to "true" or "false" to enable/disable features.

bio.example: Software engineer passionate about NestJS and TypeScript

profilePhoto.description: Profile photo URL or S3 key

description.example: Write comprehensive documentation for the NestJS project including API endpoints and setup instructions

referralCode.description: Optional referral code (e.g. EDU-XXXXX) for the referrer to earn credits when verified

refreshToken.description: Refresh token received from login or register

token.description: Email verification token sent to user email

email.description: User email address to send password reset link

token.description: Password reset token received via email

studentCategory.description: Student program category in Ghanaian university context

studentId.description: Convex users table id of the recipient

questionCredits.description: Question credits granted per redemption (>=1 if used)

creditExpiresAt.description: Unix ms when granted credits expire
Unix ms when granted credits expire
